job_summary: We are looking for an experienced Senior Unisex Stylist who is passionate about hair, styling, and client satisfaction. The ideal candidate should be confident in delivering advanced hair services for both men and women while maintaining Naturals’ service standards and hygiene protocols.
responsibilities:
Provide advanced haircutting, styling, coloring, and chemical services for men and women

Consult with clients to understand styling needs and recommend suitable treatments

Maintain high standards of hygiene, cleanliness, and workstation organization

Upsell salon services and retail products ethically

Mentor junior stylists and support team training

Ensure excellent customer experience and repeat visits
requirements:
Minimum 3–5 years experience as a Unisex Stylist in a professional salon

Strong expertise in haircuts, coloring, styling, and treatments

Good communication and customer-handling skills

Ability to work flexible shifts, including weekends

Certification in hairdressing or cosmetology preferred

job_summary: We are seeking a skilled Female All-Rounder who can confidently handle multiple beauty services and deliver consistent, high-quality experiences to clients. This role is ideal for professionals who enjoy versatility and client interaction in a fast-paced salon environment.
responsibilities:
Perform beauty services including facials, waxing, threading, clean-ups, and basic hair services

Provide manicure, pedicure, and basic spa services as per salon standards

Maintain cleanliness, hygiene, and sterilization of tools and work areas

Understand client requirements and recommend appropriate services

Assist team members during peak hours

Ensure client comfort and satisfaction throughout the service
requirements:
Minimum 2–4 years experience as a Beautician / All-Rounder

Hands-on experience in facials, waxing, threading, and basic hair services

Pleasant personality with good communication skills

Willingness to learn new techniques and services

Ability to work flexible shifts

job_summary: We are hiring a Male All-Rounder who is proficient in men’s grooming services and basic salon treatments. The ideal candidate should be customer-focused, technically skilled, and committed to maintaining service excellence.
responsibilities:
Perform men’s grooming services including haircuts, beard styling, shaving, and hair treatments

Assist with basic spa services and head massages

Maintain hygiene and cleanliness standards at all times

Understand client preferences and deliver personalized grooming services

Promote salon services and ensure repeat customer visits

Support team members and follow salon SOPs
requirements:
Minimum 1–3 years experience in men’s grooming or salon services

Strong skills in haircuts, beard styling, and basic treatments

Good interpersonal and customer service skills

Ability to work weekends and peak hours

Willingness to grow and learn advanced grooming techniques
